case_title: TD BANK USA N.A VS. SOPHIA L TROOSH ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS {C.C.P. 1033} (TRANSACTION ID # 100102324) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-14-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100080773), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A SERVED APR-19-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TROOSH, SOPHIA L
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TROOSH, SOPHIA L $639.72 PRINCIPAL, $356.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $996.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100102324)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $359.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $196.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100102324) AS TO DEFENDANT TROOSH, SOPHIA L
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT {CCP 585} (TRANSACTION ID # 100102324) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A AS TO DEFENDANT TROOSH, SOPHIA L DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-20-2019
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100067985) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100102324) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15
